blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,409 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
